rule: user-facing artifacts must be <= 12h old; warn at 6h

artifacts.notes: Command Center single-truth verdict (epc-command-center-status/v1). Rebuild = full conductor: refreshes cockpit-data, morning-status, wiki-updates, decision-queue, tracker-alerts, pipeline-state, cockpit-tiles, meeting-prep, eod-status, then folds the freshness/chain/intel/econ/executed guards into one SYSTEM verdict (CURRENT/ATTENTION/STALE). The Command Center UI reads this for its top SYSTEM STATUS banner. Installed 2026-06-19 (CC = chained always-fresh SoT view; reverses the 2026-06-11 cockpit-retired stance for command-center-v2.html).

GROUND-TRUTH system map (anti-drift Rule 0). Generated from chain_surfaces.json + chain_anchor.json + freshness-status.json by build_system_map.py. Read FIRST on any EverPass task; surfaced every EverPass turn by the everpass-system-map.mjs hook.

Outlook calendar feed. gws/Google Calendar is DEAD; legacy build-meetings-today.py wrote empty (local_date=None) => content-stale, which FAILed the chip. Backend-only now: no live user-facing surface renders meetings since the cockpit Today panel was removed + cockpit retired (2026-06-06); it only feeds the morning brief's calendar section. Populate from Microsoft Outlook via Zapier get_calendar_events_in_date_range inside a Claude session (manual until a headless Outlook poller is wired). manual_only stops the dead-Google rebuild from clobbering the Outlook data.
See meetings_today_json. Outlook feed, backend-only, manual Zapier pull (gws Calendar dead).

Brief->Audio pipeline status (NotebookLM Audio Overviews -> private podcast feed). Written by record_audio_status.py after run_brief_audio.py. Spec: Operating Manual/BRIEF-AUDIO-PIPELINE.md. Scheduled tasks: 'EverPass Brief Audio - Morning/EOD'.

artifacts.notes: Cockpit RED-tier health check reads this. Auto-rebuilt by freshness enforcer + cockpit.cmd builder chain.
Hot action queue surfaced ABOVE partnerTodos in cockpit DQ. Written by intake/inbound_router.py. Optional — empty file OK if no inbounds pending.

Cockpit Decision Queue. LEADS with the weekly exec deck Action Register (weekly-pdf/weekly-everpass.html #act-register, kind=weekly) + insights + tracker. Regenerated FIRST by the build-cockpit-state orchestrator (before cockpit_data merges it) and auto-healed here. build-decision-queue.py exits nonzero if the weekly source exists but parses 0 items, so a broken parser/source surfaces instead of drifting silent.

LLM-generated morning brief. Rebuilt by build-morning-brief.py via Anthropic API. Daily cadence (5:50 AM task); 24h/36h thresholds match that cadence. Rebuild timeout 300s (2026-06-06): the API build can exceed 120s and was timing out, leaving a daily afternoon amber.

Hermes-pattern proactive improvement brief. Daily cadence via 'EverPass Nightly Reflection' Win Scheduled Task at 07:00 local. 2-3 items max. Cockpit reads this for the Nightly Reflection banner card.
xlsx -> JSON detail export (everpass-contract-master/v1). Source: Contract Master.xlsx.
xlsx -> JSON summary export (everpass-contract-summary/v1). Source: Contract Master.xlsx.
Tier 0 snapshot anchor (epc-contract-master-snapshot/v1). Cockpit reads this for the 'Contracts data as of' badge.
Per-partner Deal Brain rollup (epc-deal-brain-summary/v1). Future Ask deal-fact answerer reads this for cheap partner lookups.

artifacts.manual_action: RETIRED 2026-07-08 (Ryan directive: stop purposeless ChatGPT-bridge watchers). The `EverPass ChatGPT Bridge Heartbeat`, `EverPass Ask Watcher`, and `EverPass Bridge+Mobile Self-Verify` scheduled tasks are DISABLED. Re-enable the tasks and set optional=False here to reactivate the bridge legs.
artifacts.notes: RETIRED 2026-07-08. ChatGPT bridge watcher tasks disabled per Ryan (bridge inbox drain is manual-only via chatgpt-inbox-process-local skill; heartbeat existed only to mask staleness). Leg kept as optional so history/tools referencing the key do not break.
State file updates only when the watcher ticks AND the inbox has new files. Stale state with empty inbox is OK; stale state with files in inbox is a real backlog.
Log mtime advances on every tick. If watcher is scheduled, this is a heartbeat.

Export chain manifest (everpass-exports-manifest/v1). Rebuilt by build_exports.py from wiki/partners/ + Partner Insights/ + contract-master-data.json. Outputs: briefs/, obsidian/, notebooklm/ under AI Related/exports/. Per-artifact thresholds (fresh<=24h, stale>36h) match the once-daily build cadence.

Sentinel for build-dashboard-sync.py. Patches goNoGoData partner headers in the main pipeline dashboard HTML from contract-master-data.json + dashboard-partner-overrides.json. Runs every 6h via run-partner-chain.cmd.
Session-end compound memory log. One file per day in AI Related/daily/.

agent-browser macro telemetry feed. Updated on-demand by Browser Agent tab in AOS Command Center; enforcer keeps it fresh with a marked _freshness_heartbeat row when idle. Public mirror at everpass-agent-browser.vercel.app refreshed via _apps/everpass-agent-browser-ui/deploy.cmd.

artifacts.manual_action:
Run: python "EVERPASS TOOLS\Scripts\build_partner_notebook_map.py" --headless
Requires: authenticated Playwright profile at AI Related/.notebooklm-profile/
First-time auth: python "EVERPASS TOOLS\Scripts\notebooklm_auth_setup.py"
artifacts.notes: Partner→NotebookLM ID mapping for Email Research Agent. Built by build_partner_notebook_map.py (Playwright headless, weekly). After rebuild, run generate_n8n_domain_map.py and paste output into n8n 'Match Partner' Code node. Set manual_only=False and add rebuild_cmd once auth-refresh automation is wired.

Content Pipeline weekly bookend (Fri week-in-review). Assembler build_content_bookend.py reads RAID + partnerships-delta + this-week OPERATOR-UPDATEs + contract-master-summary -> 2-panel HTML in Weekly Outputs/recurring/content-pipeline/. Scheduled tasks 'EverPass Content Bookend Mon' (07:00, --mode ahead) + '...Fri' (16:00, --mode review). Internal ops, no external send. Companion ahead-latest is the Monday view.

Truth feed replacing the old hardcoded 'Pipeline state' rows + dead Samsung counter in agentic-os-command-center.html. Carries last_full_refresh age + stale flag + real daily-log events. Rebuilt by build_pipeline_state.py; the full-extraction marker is stamped via build_pipeline_state.py --mark-full-refresh.

artifacts.path: C:\Users\ryan\OneDrive - EverPass Media\EVERPASS\Financial, Product, Data, EP Info\Viewership\_canon\viewership-manifest.json
artifacts.notes: Machine manifest for the Viewership node (Financial, Product, Data, EP Info/Viewership/). Rebuilt by build_viewership_node.py (organizes provider buckets, regenerates .converted.md, writes this manifest). Monthly cadence: partner viewership reports land ~30 days after month-end, so a 35d/45d envelope, NOT the 12h user-facing rule (this is a non-user-facing grounding layer). The curated index viewership-canon.md is hand-maintained and not tracked here. Queryable corpus = NotebookLM cd685c42; prior corpus mirrored in 1d35d462.

artifacts.manual_action: Run the deal-bank-weekly-diff skill (agent browser): query NotebookLM 1d35d462 with the fixed question set, write answers JSON, then `python Scripts/deal_bank_diff.py --diff <answers.json>`. The weekly task 'EverPass Deal Bank Weekly Diff' enqueues Cockpit/deal-bank-diff-request.json.
artifacts.notes: R5 chain-redesign weekly deal-bank diff. Delta-only: only fields where the finance notebook (1d35d462) disagrees with DATA_EXPORTS/deal_brain_summary.json canon are surfaced (canon value vs notebook value vs citation). Canon always wins; never written from a notebook answer. Engine: Scripts/deal_bank_diff.py.
